rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: ኅዳር፡
Homily
Synaxary entry: the Archangel’s mission to Joshua son of Nun
Greeting to the Archangel
Miracle, introduction
Text of the miracle: how the Archangel rescued the people whose boat was troubled by high wind
ታኅሣሥ፡
Homily
Miracle about the farmer who could not make a feast in honor of the Archangel because of drought and famine
Greeting to the Archangel
ታኅሥሥ:
Homily (by John, Bishop of Aksum), on the family of Dorotheos and Theopista
Miracle on the farmer who neglected making the feast of the Archangel
Synaxary entry: Mission to save Jacob from the wrath of Esau
Greeting
የካቲት፡
Homily (anonymous) on the man who prayed to the Archangel for his needs but bever worked
Miracle on the man who gave alms to the poor, who was paralyzed
Synaxary entry: Mission to Samson the giant
Greeting
መጋቢት፡
Homily (by John, Archbishop of Antioch), on (the Christian) Sabbath and Matthew the traveler
Miracle on the wealthy and generous woman who suffered from skin disease
Synaxary entry: Mission to Balaam
Greeting
ሚያዝያ፡
Homily (anonymous) on the life of the spirituals—angels and demons
Miracle on the Christian who denied that he borrowed money from a Jew
Synaxary entry: Mission to Prophet Jeremiah
Greeting
ግንቦት፡
Homily by Yoḥannǝs, Bishop of Ethiopia, who came after Bishop Yǝśḥaq, on the conflict between the consort of King Arqadewos and John Chysostom
Miracle on the Roman (Greek) nobleman whose wife was barren
Synaxary entry: Mission of the archangel to the Prophet Habakkuk
Greeting
ሰኔ፡
Homily by Bishop of Aksum on the family of Astäraniqos and Euphemia
Miracle on the Jew who was cleansed from his leprosy
Synaxary entry: The building of the church of the Archangel in place of a pagan temple in Alexandria
Greeting
ሐምሌ፡
Homily by Bishop Yoḥannǝs on the wicked wealthy man whose property was inherited by the son of his poor neighbor
Miracle on the man from whom the evil spirit was cast out during Mass service
Synaxary entry: Mission to the camp of Sennacherib
Greeting
ነሐሴ፡
Homily (anonymous) on the book of the angels that came from Jerusalem
Miracle on the blind man
Synaxary entry: Mission to the Emperor Constantine
Greeting
መስከረም፡
Homily (anonymous) on not worshipping other gods
Miracle on how the Archangel raised to heaven the relics of Saint George
Synaxary entry: Mission to Prophet Isaiah
Greeting
ጥቅምት፡
Homily (anonymous) on the need to make the angels sureties by honoring them
Miracle of the man who prayed to the Archangel for his need but never worked
Synaxary entry: Mission to Prophet Samuel
Greeting
